description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a predominantly matte black finish accented by vivid orange highlights on the rail, trigger, magazine base, and other small components. Both sides of the receiver feature a striking red heart graphic and a grayscale illustration of a gorilla, giving the weapon a unique, urban street-art aesthetic. The rifle has a short barrel, a detachable box magazine, and a top-mounted Picatinny rail with iron sights. The grip and magazine are ergonomically designed, and the stock is fixed and integrated into the rear of the receiver. The overall build suggests a lightweight, maneuverable firearm suitable for close-quarters urban environments. The materials appear to be primarily metal and polymer, with a hard, slightly matte surface finish.
description: A compact, black and orange submachine gun-style rifle with urban street-art graphics, featuring a red heart and gorilla illustration, and accented with vivid orange details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the short barrel, orange accents on the rail, and the compact width of the rifle.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the red heart graphic, gorilla illustration, and the full length of the detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the fixed stock, orange rail, and the slim profile of the rifle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the mirrored heart and gorilla graphics, as well as the ergonomic grip and magazine details.
